Home / Service Areas / Libertyville

Kitchen-remodel in Libertyville, IL

Trusted local professionals serving Libertyville and surrounding communities

Serving Libertyville, IL

Apex Kitchen Remodel transforms Libertyville's charming homes with kitchen designs that blend small-town character with contemporary living. We specialize in updating older kitchens common in Libertyville's historic districts while maintaining their unique appeal. Our solutions account for the area's harsh winters, ensuring your new kitchen remains functional and beautiful through every season. From creating cozy breakfast nooks to designing spacious islands for family gatherings, we help Libertyville homeowners make the most of their kitchens. Our local expertise means we understand how to work with Libertyville's diverse architectural styles while meeting today's lifestyle needs.

Libertyville's charming homes, many in historic districts, benefit from kitchen remodels that preserve character while improving functionality.

Kitchen-remodel Services in Libertyville

Bungalow Kitchen Remodel

Preserving Chicago's historic charm while adding modern functionality.

Mid-Century Kitchen Update

Bringing 1950s-70s ranch kitchens into the 21st century.

High-end renovations for Chicago's downtown high-rises.

Accessible Kitchen Design

Creating functional kitchens for all ages and abilities.

Learn more →

Small Kitchen Solutions

Maximizing every inch in Chicago's compact kitchens.

Learn more →
